name: asset
description: Tools for the firm's security master and custody mapping on the ayunit MCP. Reads/writes Global.Asset (one row per instrument, keyed by Asset) and Portfolio.AssetCustody (per-custodian ticker/CUSIP ↔ Asset link) — registration-by-analogy, classification validation against lookups, custody identifier lifecycle, and (v0.4.0) read-only asset lookup via identify_asset + v_AssetCustody as the mandatory pre-check before asset-register.
